title: Stablecoin startup Rain joins Mastercard as a Principal Member
snippet: Rain, which was valued at $1.95 billion during a Series C round announced in January, has an existing relationship with card issuer Visa.

snippet: Last year, Haun Ventures was reportedly seeking to raise $1 billion to launch two new crypto-focused funds.

title: DTCC eyes October tokenized securities launch with 50 DeFi and TradFi giants

title: DTC to begin tokenized asset rollout in July ahead of full launch as it gets feedback from BlackRock, Circle and others
snippet: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation will roll out its tokenization service as it gathers feedback from firms like BlackRock to Circle.

title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
snippet: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.

title: Latest FINRA okay means Securitize becomes tokenized securities one stop shop
snippet: FINRA has granted the tokenization firm Securitize approval to custody tokenized securities as part of its regular broker dealer authorization. title: FINRA green lights Securitize for tokenized IPO underwriting and custody
snippet: Securitize is the first firm to receive FINRA approval to custody tokenized securities and underwrite onchain IPOs and secondary offerings.

title: Tetra Launches Canadian-Dollar Stablecoin to Power Cross-Border Payments
snippet: Tetra Digital Group has launched a payment stablecoin backed 1:1 by Canadian dollars after receiving regulatory approval from Alberta Treasury Board and Finance. title: CLARITY Act Compromise Propels Digital Asset Shares Higher
